message: Jake
Yuriko
− The next day −
I was nursing a heavy head since this morning. Now that Guy and Kristy are gone, who killed Patricia?
Or was Patricia really killed by a genuine serial killer, and Guy and Kristy were just imitating?
Or were Guy and Kristy completely unrelated to the murders from the start?
Then who the hell committed the murder?
S
Boss!
Ah,
you were here?
It's not like you were here, you know. I thought you were dead since you kept your eyes closed and didn't move.
There's no way I'd die in a place like this.
That's true, but please don't worry me too much.
Ah, Boss.
Um, um.
What is it?
M.
Meryl has...
Meryl? What about her?
Um, Meryl has been arrested.
I got a call from the director saying Meryl was arrested.
What!? What did she do?
Well,
she's suspected of killing Guy and Kristy.
She's suspected of killing Guy and Kristy!?!
Welcome back, Boss.
Boss, you look kind of tired, don't you?

It feels as if I'm left behind the flow of the world, maintaining a silence and unchanging stillness, disconnected from what's happening outside.
The warm, humid breeze from the unadjustable air conditioning seems to darken and deepen my gloomy mood even more.
Is it because of the stream of unpleasant events that I feel somewhat down?
If this situation continues, even the most resilient will lose their spirits.
Looks like that feeling is really settling in. Her usual brightness isn't there.
I’m getting so tired of all these unpleasant things.
That's true. I wonder what will happen from now on.
I've been taking antacids lately, you know.
Isn't there something, like, fun to talk about?
Lately, Meryl has been absent or strangely distant when she’s around, and it’s concerning.
Is that really about...?
Love, perhaps?
Right now, I don’t want to play along with your jokes.
Oh, sorry. I felt like if I didn’t say something silly, I’d lose it.
Meryl wouldn’t go and kill Guy, would she?
I’m surprised that even Jennifer was one of Günter’s patients.
Well, you know, he’s famous. Most people in the entertainment industry go to see Doctor Günter.
Oh, is that how it is?
Because, it seems like this world is just piling on the stress and all sorts of things, right? I can't live without feeling refreshed from counseling.
Boss, you were worried about Jennifer, weren't you? That's cute.
What do you mean by cute?
No, I just thought it was nice in a fresh way.
Hehe.
That's nice, Boss.
I want to fall in love too.
How was the director? Are you okay?
No way, right? She's an only daughter, after all.
Yeah, she looked really weak.
Poor thing.
I wonder how it came to this?
Could it be the work of someone who holds a grudge against the director's movie?
I wonder about that.
They said the head hasn't been found.
Huh!? There's no head? Then it must be that notorious perpetrator again.
I can't take it anymore. I might be the next target!
Do you think the murders that happened close to us are truly the work of a real serial killer?
Even if the methods are the same, killing multiple people in one place is different.
That's definitely a departure from the usual pattern.
I wonder if they copied it?
But, if the New York incident was a copy of a real serial murder case, wouldn't the real culprit get mad and issue a statement?
If they did that, wouldn't they be one step closer to their own ruin? Because if their identity gets exposed from the letter, that would be a problem.
Ah, that's true.
Who on earth is the culprit?
Meryl didn't even try to hide her hostility towards Guy. That attitude when I brought up Guy's story.
It made me a bit angry.
It wouldn't be surprising if it turned out that Meryl was behind Guy's accident.
I wonder what kind of worries Jennifer has and what she confided in Günter?
I don't think Jennifer's mental state is extremely stable and that she needs treatment from a psychiatrist.
I wonder why I'm so concerned about Jennifer.
I seem to have gone a bit crazy.
Is it following the news of Guy and Kristy's death and then the daughter's death?
I wonder if the director is alright.
The fact that Patricia's head hasn't been found likely means it's related to the series of incidents.
If this continues, the director is going to break down.
It's an obvious fact that Patricia was killed by the perpetrator of the series of incidents.
If it was the same perpetrator as the serial murder case that originated in San Francisco, then all the body parts would be accounted for.
So that means the perpetrator's objective has already been achieved.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
